validationRules.description: Enforces minimum 200-character description when nepa_description__c is populated. Truncated descriptions degrade CE classification accuracy (NEPATEC feature lift 0.71). Does not fire on blank descriptions.
validationRules.errorMessage: Process Description must be at least 200 characters. Include: purpose, location summary, disturbance type (new/existing/renewal), and estimated acreage. This improves CE screening accuracy.

validationRules.description: Blocks FONSI or ROD as decision document type when review type is CE. Addresses NEPATEC doc_type conflation where ROD/FONSI appeared in the CE stratum. CE decisions use DR or CE Determination.
validationRules.errorMessage: FONSI and ROD are not valid decision document types for a Categorical Exclusion (CE) process. Use "CE Determination" or "DR" for CE decision documents.

validationRules.description: VR-003: Blocks save when NEPA waiver is invoked without a statutory citation. Agencies lose cases by asserting waivers without valid legal authority. OGC memo must be in the administrative record.
validationRules.errorMessage: NEPA waiver is checked but no statutory citation is provided. Enter the specific statutory provision authorizing the waiver (e.g., IIRIRA Section 102(c); EPAct 2005 Section 390). Attach an OGC legal sufficiency memo before advancing.

validationRules.description: VR-006: Blocks save when tiering to a prior EIS older than 5 years without supplementation review. Addresses failure_to_supplement challenge type (100% agency loss rate in PermitTEC). Requires both tiering checkbox and prior NEPA date to be set.
validationRules.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(nepa_review_type__c, "EIS"), nepa_tiering_to_prior_eis__c = true, NOT(ISBLANK(nepa_prior_nepa_date__c)), nepa_prior_nepa_date__c < (TODAY() - 1825), nepa_supplementation_review_complete__c = false )
validationRules.errorMessage: The prior EIS is more than 5 years old. A supplementation review is required under 40 CFR 1502.9(c). Check "Supplementation Review Complete" after the responsible official makes a written determination.

validationRules.description: VR-007: Blocks save when clock pause end is before start. Prevents negative nepa_clock_pause_days__c, which would shorten nepa_fra_statutory_deadline__c — an FRA compliance violation.
validationRules.errorMessage: Clock resume date cannot be before the clock pause start date. Correct the dates to ensure the statutory deadline calculation is accurate.
